description: Plumbing Inspector — inspects plumbing installations for UPC/IPC compliance including DWV systems, water supply, backflow prevention, and fixture counts

hard_stops.label: Backflow Prevention Missing
hard_stops.logic: Cross-connection control or backflow prevention device not installed where required — public water supply contamination risk

hard_stops.label: DWV Pressure Test Failed
hard_stops.logic: Drain-waste-vent system failed the required air or water pressure test — system has leaks and cannot be concealed

hard_stops.label: Improper Venting
hard_stops.logic: Plumbing vent system is improperly sized, trapped, or terminated — sewer gas intrusion hazard

soft_flags.label: Water Heater Temperature Relief
soft_flags.logic: Water heater temperature and pressure relief valve discharge pipe must terminate at an approved location — verify installation
